character.name: Isometric pixel art character, 3/4 front-facing pose, 92×92 sprite. A weathered nature-keeper in layered green and earthen robes woven with bark and moss, antler-crowned circlet on head. Gnarled wooden staff with living leaves sprouting from the tip. Bare feet, leaf-pendant necklace, small pouches of herbs. Long braided hair, lined sunworn face, calm serene expression. Faint green motes of life-essence drifting around them. Palette: forest green #2F5D3A, soft sage #8FB776, pale wheat #D9C48F. Limited 16-color palette, crisp pixels, no anti-aliasing. Dark fantasy MUD aesthetic.
